subcodes.first_line: Glory be unto Thee, O my God! Thou beholdest how this leaf hath clung to the Tree of Thy Lordship, hath voiced Thy praise, and hath turned unto Thee [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: سبحانک یا الهی تری ورقتی تمسکت بسدره ربوبیتک و نطقت بثنائک و اقبلت الیک اذ
subcodes.subjects: @prayer for women, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @prayer for protection
